sn7.5:1.1: At Sāvatthī. Then the brahmin Ahiṁsaka Bharadvaja, Bharadvaja the Harmless, approached the Blessed One and exchanged greetings with him.When they had concluded their greetings and cordial talk, he sat down to one sidesn.i.165and said to the Blessed One: "I am Ahiṁsaka the Harmless, Master Gotama. I am Ahiṁsaka the Harmless, Master Gotama."
sn7.5:3.1: When this was said, the brahmin Ahiṁsaka Bharadvaja said to the Blessed One: "Magnificent, Master Gotama! … " And the Venerable Ahiṁsaka Bharadvaja became one of the arahants.
